dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcome: Welcome back! Here's your study overview.
dashboard.no_decks_yet: No decks yet. Generate your first deck with AI!

decks.title: My Decks
decks.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this deck?

editor.apkg_pro_required: APKG export requires a Pro subscription.
editor.front_placeholder: Question or cloze text (use '{{'c1::answer'}}' for cloze)

study.title: Study Decks
study.due_count_plural: {count, plural, =0 {No cards due for review today} =1 {# card due for review today} other {# cards due for review today}}
study.all_caught_up: You're all caught up for today 🎉
study.limit_warning: You're using {current} of {limit} free decks. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited decks, statistics, media uploads, and more.
study.no_decks_desc: Create a study deck and import flashcards from your AI-generated decks to start studying with spaced repetition.

deck_view.total_cards_plural: {count, plural, =1 {# total card} other {# total cards}}
deck_view.no_cards_desc: Import cards from your AI-generated decks to start studying.
deck_view.cards_hidden_desc: Study this deck to reveal its content.

study.all_cards_present: All cards are already present in the selected deck(s).
study.toast_imported: Imported {count} {count, plural, =1 {card} other {cards}} across {decksCount} {decksCount, plural, =1 {deck} other {decks}}!
study.import_description: Import these {count} {count, plural, =1 {flashcard} other {flashcards}} into one or more of your study decks.
study.no_study_decks: No study decks found. Enter a name above to create your first deck!

settings.title: Deck Settings
settings.identity_desc: Customize the name, description, color, and icon of this study deck.
settings.description_placeholder: What will you study in this deck?
settings.daily_limits_desc: Control how many cards you study each day.
settings.learning_steps_desc: Space-separated intervals for new cards (e.g. 1m 10m). Supported units: m (minutes), h (hours), d (days).
settings.leech_desc: Cards failed too many times are flagged as leeches.
settings.lapse_threshold_desc: Card will be suspended after this many lapses.
settings.show_confidence_desc: Use the gradient confidence bar instead of Again / Hard / Good / Easy buttons.
settings.autoplay_front_desc: Automatically play audio when the card question is shown.
settings.autoplay_back_desc: Automatically play audio when the card answer is shown.
settings.toast_error_image: Please upload an image or switch to emoji icon.
settings.toast_error_image_upload: Image upload failed: {error}. Falling back to default icon.
settings.danger_desc: Actions here are destructive or modify the deck status.
settings.archive_desc: Archived decks are hidden from the daily study lists but saved.
settings.delete_desc: Permanently delete this study deck, its configuration, and all its cards.
settings.delete_dialog_desc: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this study deck? This will delete all flashcards, progress, and review logs associated with it. This action is irreversible.

create.title: Create study deck
create.desc: Give your deck a name and personality. You can add cards after creating it.

session.reveal_hint: Click or press Space to reveal
session.complete_subtitle: Great work — you studied {count, plural, =1 {# card} other {# cards}}
session.no_cards_due: No cards are due in {name} right now.
session.toast_suspend_success: Card suspended and removed from session.
session.toast_delete_success: Card deleted and removed from session.

import.title: Import cards
import.description: Choose an AI-generated deck to snapshot into this study deck. Cards won't be duplicated if already imported.
import.all_imported: All cards from this deck are already imported.

csv.title: Import from CSV
csv.description: Upload a CSV file. The first column will be imported as **Front**, the second as **Back**, and the optional third column (semicolon-separated) as **Tags**.
csv.upload_drag: Click to upload or drag & drop
csv.invalid_rows: Could not find any valid rows. Ensure values are comma-separated.
csv.header_only: The file only contains a header row.
csv.parse_error: An error occurred while parsing the CSV file.

apkg.title: Import from APKG
apkg.description: Upload an Anki .apkg file. Only front/back text will be imported. Media, scheduling, and styling are ignored.
apkg.upload_drag: Click to upload or drag & drop
apkg.invalid_apkg: This file is not a valid Anki package.
apkg.no_notes: No notes found in this APKG file.
apkg.cards_found: {count, plural, =1 {# card found} other {# cards found}}

bulk_actions.title: Bulk Actions
bulk_actions.selected_plural: {count, plural, =1 {# card selected} other {# cards selected}}
bulk_actions.delete_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {count} selected {count, plural, =1 {card} other {cards}}? This action is irreversible.
bulk_actions.suspend_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to suspend {count} selected {count, plural, =1 {card} other {cards}}? They will be excluded from all study sessions.
bulk_actions.unsuspend_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to unsuspend {count} selected {count, plural, =1 {card} other {cards}}? They will return to their previous study states.
bulk_actions.edit_desc_single: Modify the content and tags of this card.
bulk_actions.edit_desc_plural: Apply tag and flag modifications to {count} selected cards.

generate.title: Generate Deck
generate.description: Describe what you want to learn and AI will create a complete flashcard deck.
generate.ai_decide_hint: The AI will dynamically generate a suitable number of cards (up to {max}) based on the depth of your content.
generate.prompt_placeholder: Create a deck of 50 flashcards about JavaScript closures...
generate.import_files_desc: Upload documents, text files, or images and AI will generate flashcards automatically.
generate.drag_drop_files: Drag and drop files here or <browse>browse</browse>
generate.supported_formats: Supported formats: PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Images, Text (.txt)
generate.import_url_desc: Enter a web page or YouTube link and AI will generate flashcards automatically.
generate.url_supported_hint: YouTube videos, articles, and documentation pages are supported.
generate.config_desc: Customize system instructions and deck configurations.
generate.ai_instructions_placeholder:
Examples:
• Focus heavily on specific terms and direct definitions.
• Structure questions like college exam items.
• Avoid basic trivia; prioritize deep conceptual links.
• Translate and include phonetic spelling on the back.
generate.no_templates: No custom templates saved yet. Write instructions above and save to repeat them.
generate.please_wait_hint:
Please don't close this page.
Large PDFs and images may take up to 1 minute.
generate.toast_prompt_short: Please enter a more detailed prompt (at least 10 characters).
generate.toast_plan_limit: Your plan allows up to {max} cards per deck.
generate.toast_limit_reached: You've reached your monthly generation limit. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited generations.
generate.toast_upload_empty: Please upload at least one file.
generate.toast_max_files: Maximum of 5 files can be uploaded per request.
generate.toast_max_size: Maximum combined file upload size is 4MB.
generate.toast_file_unsupported: This file type is not supported.
generate.toast_prompt_empty: Please enter a name for the prompt
generate.toast_instructions_save_limit: Instructions cannot exceed 5000 characters to save
generate.confirm_discard_changes: You have unsaved changes in AI Instructions. Discard them?
generate.confirm_delete_prompt: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?

audio.title: Text-to-Speech (TTS)
audio.toggle_desc: Automatically synthesize pronunciation audio for generated cards and upload to Google Drive.
audio.not_connected_warning: Google Drive is not connected. Audio generation requires Bring-Your-Own-Storage. Connect in Settings first.

auth.email_not_different: New email must be different from your current email.
auth.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.

imports.no_valid_rows: No valid rows found (front and back are required)
imports.apkg_pro_required: APKG import requires a Pro subscription.
imports.apkg_no_database: No Anki database found in file.
imports.apkg_invalid_database: The database inside the APKG file is invalid or corrupt.

youtube.invalid_url: The provided URL is not a valid YouTube link.
youtube.video_not_found: This YouTube video could not be found. It may be private or deleted.
youtube.no_captions_available: No subtitles or captions are available for this video.
youtube.region_restricted: This video is restricted in our server's region.
youtube.age_restricted: This video is age-restricted and requires signing in.
youtube.rate_limit: Our connection to YouTube is temporarily rate-limited. Please try again shortly.
youtube.youtube_rate_limit: Our connection to YouTube is temporarily rate-limited. Please try again shortly.
youtube.bot_detected: Our request was flagged by YouTube's security system. Please try again later.
youtube.consent_required: Access to this video requires verifying cookies or consent page approval.
youtube.login_required_unknown: This video requires signing in. It may be members-only or unavailable.
youtube.timeout: Retrieving the transcript timed out. Please try again.
youtube.provider_error: An unexpected error occurred while parsing the subtitles.

hero.description: Generate complete, high-quality flashcard decks with AI. Edit, organize, and export directly to Anki.

features.title: Everything you need to learn faster
features.subtitle: From AI generation to Anki export — a complete workflow for spaced repetition learners.

ai.title: AI-Powered Generation
ai.desc: Describe any topic and get a complete, structured flashcard deck in seconds.

editor.title: Rich Editor
editor.desc: Edit cards inline with rich text, cloze syntax, images, and drag-and-drop reordering.

export.title: Export to Anki
export.desc: Download your decks as .apkg or CSV files ready for Anki import.

types.title: Multiple Card Types
types.desc: Basic front/back, cloze deletions, or mixed decks — all supported.

secure.title: Secure & Private
secure.desc: Your decks are protected with row-level security. Only you can access your data.

study.title: Study Smarter
study.desc: Spend less time creating cards and more time learning with spaced repetition.

steps.title: How it works
steps.subtitle: Four simple steps from prompt to study-ready deck
steps.step_1_desc: Enter a prompt like "50 flashcards about JavaScript closures"
steps.step_2_desc: Our AI creates accurate, well-structured flashcards tailored to your level
steps.step_3_desc: Review and customize cards in our intuitive editor
steps.step_4_desc: Download as .apkg and import directly into Anki

testimonials.title: Loved by learners
testimonials.quote_1: Flashtar cut my deck creation time from hours to minutes. The quality of generated cards is impressive.
testimonials.quote_2: Finally, a tool that understands cloze deletions. Perfect for language learning.
testimonials.quote_3: The export to Anki works flawlessly. This is exactly what I needed for my certification prep.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need more

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How does AI deck generation work?
faq.a1: Enter a prompt describing what you want to learn. Our AI uses OpenAI to generate structured flashcards with front/back or cloze format, then saves them to your account.
faq.a2: Yes! Every card is fully editable. You can modify text, add images, reorder cards, and change card types after generation.
faq.a3: Free users can export to CSV. Pro users also get .apkg export for direct Anki import.
faq.a4: Yes. The free plan includes 3 AI generations per month and up to 50 cards per deck.
faq.q5: How do I cancel my subscription?
faq.a5: Manage your subscription anytime through the billing section in your account settings.

toast.cancel_success: Subscription successfully canceled at the end of the billing period.

google_drive.title: Google Drive Storage (BYOS)
google_drive.description: Bring Your Own Storage. Connect your Google account to automatically store generated Text-to-Speech audio files and media in your private Google Drive under 'Flashtar/Audio'.

audio_usage.description: Generating text-to-speech audio consumes character credits. Your credits reset monthly based on your subscription.
